Interface IProgramMethod

All Superinterfaces:
Declaration, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, IObserverFunction, MemberDeclaration, ModelElement, Named, NonTerminalProgramElement, Operator, ProgramElement, Sorted, SortedOperator, SourceElement, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
ProgramMethod, ProgramSV
public interface IProgramMethod extends IObserverFunction, MemberDeclaration

  • Method Details

    • getMethodDeclaration

      MethodDeclaration getMethodDeclaration()

    • getParameterType

      KeYJavaType getParameterType(int i)
      returns the KeYJavaType of the i-th parameter declaration. This method does not care about the invoker as argSort does.
      Parameters:
      i - the int specifying the parameter position
      Returns:
      the KeYJavaType of the i-th parameter

    • getBody

      StatementBlock getBody()

    • isConstructor

      boolean isConstructor()
      Test whether the declaration is a constructor.

    • getParameters

      ImmutableArray<ParameterDeclaration> getParameters()

    • getParamTypes

      ImmutableArray<KeYJavaType> getParamTypes()
      Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
      Returns the parameter types of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
      Specified by:
      getParamTypes in interface IObserverFunction

    • collectParameters

      ImmutableList<LocationVariable> collectParameters()
      Returns:
      The list of LocationVariables passed as parameters to this IProgramMethod.
